info.title: Action Archive for BigFix Platform — REST API
info.description:
REST API for the Action Archive for BigFix Platform.

## Authentication

Two authentication schemes are supported:

1. **Bearer JWT** (`Authorization: Bearer <token>`). The primary mechanism. Obtain a token from `POST /api/auth/login`, then include it on every subsequent request. Used by the web UI and recommended for all programmatic integration.
2. **`X-API-Key` header**. Exclusive to the two Audit Agent endpoints (`GET /api/admin/deleted-action-ids` and `POST /api/admin/deleted-actions`). Keys are created and managed under Administration → System Settings → API Keys.

## Unauthenticated endpoints

The following endpoints do not require authentication: `/api/health`, `/api/auth/login`, `/api/auth/login-config`, `/api/auth/password-policy`, `/api/auth/forgot-password`, `/api/auth/reset-password`.

get.description: Get login page customization settings (unauthenticated).

post.description: Authenticate user and return JWT token.

get.description: Get current authenticated user information.

post.description: Logout current user and revoke the token.

get.description: Get current password policy (public endpoint for form validation).

post.description: Change own password (requires current password).

Set new password after admin reset.
Only works when must_change_password is true.

Request a password reset email.
Always returns success to prevent user enumeration.
Reset password using a valid token.

get.description: Get current user's notification preferences.
Get distinct site names for filtering (scoped to user permissions).
Get distinct issuer names for filtering (scoped to user permissions).
List archived actions with filtering and pagination (scoped to user permissions).
Export actions to CSV format with optional filters (scoped to user permissions).
Export actions to PDF format with optional filters (scoped to user permissions).
Get detailed information about a specific action (scope-checked).
Export targets for a specific action to CSV (scope-checked).
Get dashboard statistics (scoped by user permissions).
List collection runs with optional filters.
Get detailed log entries for a specific collection run.
Get progress of the currently running collection.

post.description: Trigger a new collection run (admin only).

get.description: List all users with account status details.

post.description: Create a new user (admin only).

Admin resets another user's password.
Sets must_change_password flag so user must set a new password on next login.
Unlock a locked user account (admin only).

get.description: Get scope assignments for a user.

put.description: Set scope assignments for a user (replaces all existing scopes).

get.description: Get all available site names and issuers from the actions database.
Get all system settings.
List all API keys (without revealing the key values).

post.description: Generate a new API key. Returns the raw key ONCE - it cannot be retrieved again.

put.description: Reactivate a previously revoked API key.

get.description: Report whether the bundled audit-agent package is available for download.
Stream the bundled BigFix Audit Agent installer zip from local disk.
Get audit log entries (admin or auditor).
Export audit log entries as CSV.
Export audit log entries as PDF.

post.description:
Delete actions from the BigFix console (marks them as deleted in BigFix).
Does NOT delete from our archive — only removes from BigFix console view.

Modes:
- action_ids: Delete specific actions by their archive DB IDs
- all_archived: Delete ALL archived actions that are stopped/expired and still in BigFix
Purge actions older than specified days.

get.description: Get scheduler status and next run times.

post.description: Trigger manual database pruning.

get.description: Get pruning run history.

Return list of bigfix_action_ids already in the deleted_actions table.
Used by the historical audit log scanner to skip already-known deletions.

post.description:
Receive deletion event from BigFix audit agent.

This endpoint is called by the agent script running on the BigFix server.
It records actions that were deleted from BigFix before being archived.

Authentication: Requires X-API-Key header

schema.title: Response Create Deleted Action Api Admin Deleted Actions Post

get.description:
Get list of actions that were deleted before being archived.

Only shows actions where was_archived = false.
Get current SSL certificate information.

post.description: Upload and validate a new SSL certificate and private key.

get.description: Get current connection settings (passwords masked).

post.description: Test BigFix server connection with provided credentials.
Test database connection with provided credentials.

get.description: Get current SMTP settings (password masked).

post.description: Send a test email to verify SMTP configuration.

get.description: Get notification settings from system_settings table.

Read application log entries from journalctl.
Returns structured log entries for the bigfix-archive service.
Read Nginx log entries. Returns unavailable status if Nginx is not installed.
Read PostgreSQL log entries. Returns unavailable status if PostgreSQL is not installed.
List all available database backups.

post.description: Create a new database backup using pg_dump.

get.description: Download a backup file.

post.description: Restore database from a backup file. THIS IS DESTRUCTIVE.

get.description: Export collection run history as CSV.
Export application (journalctl) log entries as CSV.
Export Nginx log entries as CSV. Returns 404 if Nginx is not installed locally.
Export PostgreSQL log entries as CSV. Returns 404 if PostgreSQL is not installed locally.

DeletedActionCreateSchema.description: Schema for receiving deletion events from agent.

ForcePasswordChangeSchema.title: ForcePasswordChangeSchema

PasswordPolicySchema.description: Current password policy for display to users.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Audit-Agent-only endpoints. Keys managed under Administration → System Settings → API Keys.
